meta.title: PreviewKit — The Infrastructure for Customization
meta.description: The Stripe for Product Customization Previews. Drop-in SDK. Real-time preview. 300 DPI print. Live in 5 minutes.

headline: The Infrastructure
for Customization
hero.sub: The Stripe for product customization previews. One SDK. Real-time previews. Print-ready output. Zero dev time.

problem.headline: Customization is broken for sellers.
problem.sub: Every order is a manual fire drill. Your team is the bottleneck.

points.title: Manual Workflows
points.body: Each custom order requires 20–40 minutes of manual mockup creation. Your team edits files, screenshots previews, and emails back and forth — for every single order.

points.title: Communication Chaos
points.body: Back-and-forth messages across email, DMs, and notes. Approvals slip through the cracks. Customers wait days for a simple preview.

points.title: Costly Reprint Errors
points.body: Wrong files, low-resolution uploads, misunderstood layouts. Each reprint costs you money and destroys customer trust.

solution.headline: One snippet. Instant preview. Zero friction.
solution.sub: PreviewKit injects a live customization studio directly on your product page — no redirects, no rebuilds, no dev team required.

pillars.label: Live Preview
pillars.sub: Customers see exactly what they'll get — instantly, in real time

pillars.label: 300 DPI Output
pillars.sub: Production-ready print file generated automatically on every confirmed order

pillars.label: Zero Dev Time
pillars.sub: Paste one line of code. Works on Shopify, WooCommerce, or any HTML page

pillars.label: Your Brand
pillars.sub: Button colour, labels, and modal match your store — fully configurable

howItWorks.headline: From upload to print-ready in seconds.

steps.label: Upload
steps.body: Customer uploads their photo directly on your product page. Resolution check happens automatically.

steps.label: Preview
steps.body: Live canvas renders the design in real time. Drag, pinch, zoom — exactly what they'll receive.

steps.label: Confirm
steps.body: One tap locks the design. A production-ready 300 DPI file is generated and stored instantly.

steps.label: Deliver
steps.body: Your team receives a print-ready file with the order. No back-and-forth. No manual steps.

buyerValues.label: Instant Gratification
buyerValues.body: See the final product before purchasing. No waiting, no guessing.

buyerValues.label: Total Control
buyerValues.body: Drag, zoom, and pick layouts until it's perfect — with no assistance needed.

buyerValues.label: Purchase Confidence
buyerValues.body: What they see is exactly what they get. Returns and disputes drop significantly.

comparison.headline: The old way is costing you.

infrastructure.headline: Infrastructure, not just a widget.
infrastructure.sub: PreviewKit is API-first, template-driven, and multi-tenant — built to power customization across thousands of stores.

pillars.label: API-First Design
pillars.body: Every action — upload, preview, confirm, deliver — is a clean REST endpoint. Integrate with any backend, any workflow.

pillars.label: Template-Driven
pillars.body: Product templates define canvas, print zone, layouts, and constraints. New products go live in minutes, not sprints.

pillars.label: Multi-Tenant
pillars.body: One deployment serves unlimited vendors. Each gets isolated data, their own branding, and independent configuration.

contact.headline: Ready to go live?
contact.sub: Tell us about your store. We'll have your first template live before the call ends.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Tell us more
fields.placeholder: How many SKUs? Which platform? Any questions?
